BannerConfig.description: Banner configuration for version-level or site-level banners.   Site-wide banner configuration

text.description: Banner message text. Supports markdown links like [text](/url).

type.description: Banner style: info, warning, error, success   Banner type

id.description: Unique identifier for the tab group

VersionConfig.description: Per-version configuration that can override global config settings. Loaded from docs/{version}/_version_.json

badge.description: Short badge text shown next to the version (e.g., "Beta", "LTS", "Deprecated").

banner.description: Banner shown at the top of every page in this version. Overrides global banner.

hidden.description: Hide this version from the version switcher. Useful for unreleased versions.

label.description: Display label for this version (e.g., "v1.0 (Stable)"). Defaults to directory name.

tabGroups.description: Override tab groups for this version. Empty array = no tabs.
